channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: America's Race Categories Face a Stress Test
item.description: The next major civil rights battle may be whether the U.S.'s traditional racial categories can keep pace with its evolving demographics. Why it matters: The country is moving toward...

item.title: The debate over America's vaccine future
item.description: Key decisions in the coming months will shape U.S. vaccine policy for years and affect public perception.

item.title: U.S. and Iran expected to sign agreement to end war electronically Sunday
item.description: The U.S. and Iran, with Pakistani and Qatari mediators, are set to hold a virtual meeting and sign a memorandum on Sunday.

item.title: ABC's FCC battle could redefine press freedom
item.description: The outcome of ABC's legal fight with the FCC may set a key precedent for press freedom and business influence.
